title: Division of servient estate not division of servitude
doc_html:
§65.  Division of servient estate not division of servitude

The division of a tract burdened by a mineral servitude does not divide the servitude.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §65, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§65.  Division of servient estate not division of servitude
The division of a tract burdened by a mineral servitude does not divide the servitude.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §65, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
